steps.title: Identify scale factor and apply the area scaling rule
steps.content: Each side of EFGH is 6 times the corresponding side of ABCD, giving a linear scale factor of $k = 6$. For similar figures, areas scale by $k^2$, so the area scale factor is $6^2 = 36$.

steps.title: Calculate the area of EFGH
steps.content: $A_{\text{EFGH}} = 66 \times 36 = 2,376$ square units. That matches choice D — D is correct.
